properties.Name: Mount Isa

properties.Name: Olympic Dam
properties.Est. Reserves: 558 Mt (1.85% Cu) + 42 Mt (0.84 Cu) = 10.67 Mt contained Cu

properties.Name: Greenbushes

properties.Name: GEMCO (Groote Eylandt Mining Company)
properties.Est. Reserves: 46 Mt (42.2% Mn) ROM 56% yield + 6.1 Mt (40% Mn) sands 20% yield
